ps.title: A poorly engineered system costs more than it returns.
ps.problem.label: What slows enterprises down
ps.problem.1: Rigid software that no longer matches how the business actually works.
ps.problem.2: Projects that drift — over budget, late, hard to maintain.
ps.problem.3: Accumulated technical debt that blocks every new evolution.
ps.problem.4: Security and compliance treated as an afterthought.
ps.solution.label: How Sycelim responds
ps.solution.1: Systems designed around your processes — not the other way around.
ps.solution.2: Architecture thought through up front, for scale and longevity.
ps.solution.4: Security and compliance built into the engineering from day one.
pillars.title: Three principles behind every system we deliver.
pillar.1.title: Engineering first
pillar.1.desc: We design before we code. Architecture, data models and trade-offs are decided deliberately — so the system holds as it grows.
pillar.2.title: Genuinely bespoke
pillar.2.desc: No off-the-shelf compromise. Each solution is shaped around your business rules, your workflows and your real constraints.
pillar.3.title: Security & quality
pillar.3.desc: Automated testing, code review, hardened APIs and compliance. Reliability is not optional — it is engineered in.

svc.1.desc: Software that mirrors your processes and removes manual friction.
svc.2.title: Complex web platforms
svc.2.desc: Multi-actor portals built to scale, with rich roles and workflows.

svc.3.desc: Field-ready mobile experiences synchronised with your back office.

svc.5.desc: We rescue ageing systems and bring them up to current standards.

fab.desc: Orange Fab Côte d'Ivoire, launched in 2014, is the Orange group's first accelerator in Africa. Sycelim Technologies is among the winners of the first season — mentoring, access to Orange APIs and international visibility.
cta.title: You have a complex project. We have the engineering to deliver it.
cta.sub: Tell us where you want to go. We'll come back with a clear, structured response — and a quote.
footer.tagline: Software engineering for custom enterprise systems. Architecture, quality, scale and security.
footer.copy: © Sycelim Technologies — Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire · Software engineering company
svc.1.long: Software built around how your organisation actually works — your rules, your roles, your workflows.
svc.1.prob: Spreadsheets and disconnected tools no longer keep up. Manual steps multiply errors and slow every decision.
svc.1.sol: We model your processes and build a single system that automates them — with the right access for every role.
svc.1.res: Fewer errors, faster operations, and a single source of truth for your teams.
svc.2.long: Multi-actor portals that bring members, providers, managers and partners together on one secure platform.
svc.2.prob: Different actors with different needs, but siloed data that never reconciles.
svc.2.sol: We design a scalable platform with rich roles, real-time flows and a clear, traceable data model.
svc.2.res: Every actor works on the same reliable platform — one that grows with your activity.
svc.3.long: Field applications, synchronised in real time with your back office and your APIs.
svc.3.prob: Your teams and members are mobile, but your tools assume everyone stays at a desk.
svc.3.sol: We build cross-platform apps connected by secure APIs, with offline mode and reliable sync.
svc.3.res: Services that follow your users wherever they are — with data that stays consistent.
svc.4.long: Robust, secure foundations that let your systems exchange data with confidence — internally and with partners.
svc.4.prob: Fragile, undocumented integrations. Every new connection is a risk.
svc.4.sol: We design documented, versioned, secure APIs and the backend services that carry them.
svc.4.res: Integrations that are reliable, extensible and auditable — not dreaded.
svc.5.long: We bring ageing systems up to current standards — without breaking the operations that depend on them.
svc.5.prob: A legacy system still runs the business, but it is slow, risky and impossible to evolve.
svc.5.sol: We audit, secure and rebuild incrementally — migrating value without a brutal cutover.
svc.5.res: A modern, maintainable system — and an operation that never stops.

svc.sol.label: Solution

methode.title: We don't improvise software. We engineer it.
methode.lead: A structured, industrialised path from need to production — designed to keep complex projects under control, on every front: scope, quality, security and time.
methode.p1.title: Rigour over improvisation
methode.p1.desc: Decisions are documented, traceable and deliberate — not made on the fly.
methode.p2.title: Industrialised delivery
methode.p2.desc: Versioning, code review, automated testing and CI: quality is built into the pipeline.
methode.p3.title: Visible at every step
methode.p3.desc: Short iterations and regular checkpoints keep you in control of scope and budget.
methode.quote: A method made for projects that can't afford to fail.
step.del.label: Deliverables
step.1.title: Needs analysis
step.1.desc: We start by understanding your business, not your software wish-list. We map processes, constraints, actors and risks — and translate them into clear, prioritised requirements.
step.2.title: Architecture design
step.2.desc: Before a line of production code, we design the system: data model, services, integrations and security. This is where scalability and longevity are decided.
step.3.title: Agile development
step.3.desc: We build in short iterations, with working increments you can see and steer. Code review and versioning are non-negotiable at every commit.
step.4.title: Quality assurance
step.4.desc: Quality is not a phase at the end — it runs throughout. Automated tests, manual QA and security checks validate every release before it ships.
step.5.title: Deployment
step.5.desc: We put the system into production reliably and reversibly, with monitoring in place from day one — so going live is a controlled event, not a leap.
step.6.title: Evolutionary maintenance
step.6.desc: A system is alive. We keep it secure, performant and aligned with your business as it changes — with a clear, accountable support relationship.

act.title: What we think about building software that lasts.
act.lead: Engineering notes, methodology and field lessons from the systems we build and run.
act.1.title: Why we call ourselves an engineering company, not a web agency
act.1.excerpt: The difference is not just wording: it changes how software is designed, built and maintained over time.
act.2.title: Security is not bolted on at the end: it is designed from day one
act.2.excerpt: Treating security as a final step means you have already lost. In a system that handles sensitive data, protection is an architectural decision.
act.3.title: Technical debt: the hidden cost that eventually slows everything down
act.3.excerpt: Software that becomes slower and slower to evolve does not have a speed problem: it has a debt problem. Here is how we avoid it - and how to pay it down.
act.cta.title: Do these reflections apply to your project?

faq.nav.label: Questions
faq.nav.2: What types of projects do you work on?
faq.nav.3: Do you work only in Côte d'Ivoire?
faq.nav.4: How much does a project cost?
faq.nav.5: How long does a project take?
faq.nav.6: Can you take over an existing system?
faq.q2: What types of projects do you work on?
faq.q3: Do you work only in Côte d'Ivoire?
faq.q4: How much does a project cost?
faq.q5: How long does a project take?
faq.q6: Can you take over an existing system?
faq.q7: How do you handle security and compliance?
faq.q8: Do you provide maintenance after delivery?
faq.q10: How do we get started with you?
faq.a1: No. We are a software engineering company. A web agency starts from a template or framework; we start from a problem, an architecture and a data model. We build bespoke enterprise systems, engineered for scale, security and longevity — not just websites.
faq.a2: Custom business systems (memberships, contributions, claims, billing), web platforms, mobile applications, secure APIs and integrations, and legacy modernisation. We specialise in mutual-insurance and health-coverage organisations, where data sensitivity and regulatory compliance are central.
faq.a3: We are based in Abidjan, but our systems are deployed beyond borders — including for organisations across West Africa. The same engineering discipline applies wherever the system runs.
faq.a4: It depends on scope, complexity and integration constraints — there is no fixed price for bespoke engineering. We start every engagement with an analysis phase, then deliver a clear, scoped quote. The simplest way to get an estimate is to tell us about your project.
faq.a5: It depends on scope. Rather than promising an unrealistic deadline, we work in clear phases — analysis and architecture first, then iterative delivery — so you see working software early and progress stays predictable.
faq.a6: Yes. Modernising an existing system almost never means rewriting everything at once. We map what exists, isolate the risk areas, secure them with tests, then modernise incrementally — keeping the system in service at every step.
faq.a7: Security is an architectural decision, not a last-minute audit. Access control, encryption of sensitive data, hardened APIs and regulatory compliance are designed in from the first decisions — a cybersecurity engineer is involved from the start, not at the end.
faq.a8: Yes. We see ourselves as a long-term partner, accountable for the systems we deliver — not a vendor that disappears once the system goes live. Maintenance, evolution and support are part of how we work.
faq.a9: We choose technology based on the problem, not the other way around. Depending on the project, this includes Node.js, FastAPI and PHP on the backend, React on the frontend, Flutter for mobile, and ERP solutions like Odoo where relevant — always connected through secure APIs.
faq.a10: Tell us about your project through the contact form, or reach out directly. We start with a conversation to understand the problem, then propose an analysis phase — the real first step of any solid system.
method.card.1.desc: Mapping needs, constraints, actors and risks.
method.card.2.desc: Data model, services, integrations and security designed up front.
method.card.3.desc: Short iterations, visible increments, systematic code review.
method.card.4.desc: Automated tests, QA and security checks before every release.
method.card.5.desc: Reliable, monitored production rollout — no leap into the unknown.
method.card.6.desc: Long-term maintenance, security and evolution of the system.
real.mugef.title: Platform 'Single Smart Card'
real.mugef.prob: Memberships, contributions, claims and billing were managed in disconnected tools, with no consolidated view for decision-making.
real.mugef.sol: A single platform bringing together member management, contributions, claims and billing — with integrated business intelligence built around a smart-card model.
real.mugef.imp: A single source of truth, accelerated claims processing, and reporting that informs real decisions.
real.mugef.card.name: MUGEF-CI
real.mudci.title: Health insurance on Odoo, connected to providers
real.mudci.prob: Exchanges with providers were manual and slow, with no secure, real-time link to the central management system.
real.mudci.sol: An integrated solution on Odoo ERP, complemented by a dedicated provider web application connected via secure APIs.
real.mudci.imp: Providers and managers work on the same live data — fewer disputes, faster processing, full traceability.
real.mudci.card.name: MUDCI
real.cteria.title: Health insurance management & online payments
real.cteria.prob: Collections relied on in-person, cash-based processes — difficult to track and reconcile.
real.cteria.sol: A health-insurance management system paired with online collections, accepting mobile money, bank card and PayPal payments.
real.cteria.imp: Members pay as they prefer, collections are tracked in real time, and reconciliation becomes automatic.
real.cteria.card.name: CTERIA-CI
real.musarti.title: SESAMS, compliant by design with UEMOA rules
real.musarti.prob: The organisation needed software aligned with its bylaws and the UEMOA regulatory framework — not a generic tool.
real.musarti.sol: SESAMS, a health-insurance business application designed to match the organisation's bylaws, internal rules and regional compliance requirements.
real.musarti.imp: Operations compliant by construction — auditable, defensible and ready to follow the regulation.
real.musarti.card.name: MUSARTI
real.sigem.title: One engine, deployed for multiple organisations
real.sigem.prob: Several mutual-insurance organisations needed the same robust management capability — without rebuilding it five times.
real.sigem.sol: SESAMS deployed as a shared, configurable platform for MUSARTI, MUSACNRA, MUDCI, MAADO (Burkina Faso) and MA-SUCAF.
real.sigem.imp: Proven scalability across organisations and beyond borders — one engineering investment, multiple deployments.
real.sigem.card.name: SIGEM

real.refs.row3.objet: SESAMS application deployed for 5 mutual organisations
real.refs.row4.objet: Health insurance management & collections + online payments

team.role.1.desc: Defines the structure of every system — data models, services, trade-offs — and keeps the whole coherent as it grows.
team.role.2.desc: Builds protection and compliance into the engineering — securing data, APIs and access from the very first design decision.
team.role.3.desc: Build the robust services and APIs that carry the business logic — reliable, documented and secure.
team.role.4.desc: Turns complex workflows into clear, usable interfaces for real users every day.

team.role.6.desc: Ensure quality and make delivery predictable — rigorous testing and agile rhythm.
team.collab.title: A team shaped to your project
team.collab.lead: We compose each team to match the actual complexity of your project. Architecture and security are constant; QA, agile facilitation and additional developers scale as needed.
team.collab.1.title: Architecture always on
team.collab.1.desc: Architecture and security are engaged from day one, on every project.
team.collab.2.title: Scalable team
team.collab.2.desc: Backend, frontend, mobile and QA adjust to match the actual complexity of the problem.
team.collab.3.title: Systematic review
team.collab.3.desc: Every delivery goes through a code review — non-negotiable.
team.collab.4.title: Long-term
team.collab.4.desc: We maintain and evolve the systems we deliver.
about.history.body: Founded in 2009 and reconstituted in its current form in 2015, Sycelim Technologies was built on the engineering of complete software solutions (backend, web and mobile frontend) for demanding organisations, particularly in the mutual-insurance and health-coverage sector.
about.vision.sub: Too many systems are assembled quickly and abandoned slowly. We take the opposite approach: deliberate design, disciplined execution, and a long-term view of every system we build. Our role is to turn complex business problems into reliable software — and to remain accountable for them over time.
about.pos.no.1: A generalist agency that does 'a bit of everything digital'.
about.pos.no.2: A team that starts from a framework instead of a problem.
about.pos.no.3: A vendor that disappears once the site goes live.
about.pos.yes.1: A software engineering firm specialised in bespoke enterprise systems.
about.pos.yes.2: Architects who design for scale, quality and security from the start.
about.pos.yes.3: A long-term partner, accountable for the systems we deliver.
about.org.body: Every project is carried by a clear architecture, supported by complementary expertise — assembled to match the problem, never oversized.
about.org.1.title: Architecture
about.org.1.desc: Sets the technical direction and keeps the system coherent.
about.org.2.title: Security
about.org.2.desc: Builds protection and compliance into the engineering — not added after.
about.org.3.title: Development
about.org.3.desc: Builds backend, frontend and mobile with disciplined care.
about.org.4.title: Quality & delivery
about.org.4.desc: Testing and agile facilitation make delivery predictable.
about.culture.a.title: Think before building
about.culture.a.desc: Every system starts with analysis and architecture. Speed comes from clarity, not shortcuts.
about.culture.b.title: Quality is non-negotiable
about.culture.b.desc: Testing, review and security are part of the work — not options to sacrifice when time is short.
about.culture.c.title: Owning the long term
about.culture.c.desc: We build systems we can stand behind for years — maintainable, documented, ready to evolve.
